steps.title: Identify the key warning
steps.content: The passage warns that modern beliefs and assumptions may differ from those of Tanner's time, and scholars must account for this when analyzing his work.

steps.title: Apply the consequence
steps.content:
Choice A — risk judging Tanner's painting by standards that may not be historically appropriate. directly describes the consequence of forgetting the passage's warning: risk judging by standards that may not be historically appropriate. The other choices raise unrelated issues (conflating views, forgoing analysis, assuming critique).

That matches Choice A — risk judging Tanner's painting by standards that may not be historically appropriate..
